special_mechanics.name: Character Selection & Movement Variance
special_mechanics.description: Six playable characters with varying speed attributes. Navvie and Thug are slowest but strongest. Brigand and Mercenary are mid-range. Gentleman and Preacher/Scientist have highest movement speed.

physics_values.note: Qualitative only; no quantitative values documented

special_mechanics.name: Top-Down Movement
special_mechanics.description: Top-down run and gun gameplay with 4-directional or 8-directional movement typical of the era

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay overview and character speed classifications but no precise physics parameters, sub-pixel data, or numerical movement values. Game is a top-down run-and-gun with character-based speed variance rather than physics-driven movement mechanics emphasis.
